option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@color/watermelon_light">
<!-- Toolbar --> <androidx.appcompat.widget.Toolbar android:id="@+id/toolbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="?attr/actionBarSize" style="@style/Widget.RecipeBook.Toolbar" app:title="Add Recipe" />
<!-- Scrollable form --> <ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/screen_padding">
<!-- Recipe Name --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.RecipeBook.TextInputLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/hint_recipe_name" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_title" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textCapSentences" android:maxLines="1" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Category --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.RecipeBook.TextInputLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/hint_category" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_category" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textCapSentences" android:maxLines="1" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Prep Time --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.RecipeBook.TextInputLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/hint_prep_time" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_prep_time" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="text" android:maxLines="1" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Ingredients --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.RecipeBook.TextInputLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/hint_ingredients" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_ingredients" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textMultiLine|textCapSentences" android:minLines="4" android:gravity="top" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Steps --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.RecipeBook.TextInputLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/hint_steps" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_steps" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textMultiLine|textCapSentences" android:minLines="5" android:gravity="top" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Save button --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_save" style="@style/Widget.RecipeBook.Button.Primary" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/btn_save" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" />
<!-- Delete button (only shown when editing) --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_delete" style="@style/Widget.RecipeBook.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/btn_delete" android:visibility="gone" />
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@color/watermelon_light">
<!-- Toolbar --> <androidx.appcompat.widget.Toolbar android:id="@+id/toolbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="?attr/actionBarSize" style="@style/Widget.RecipeBook.Toolbar" app:title="Add Recipe" />
<!-- Scrollable form --> <ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/screen_padding">
<!-- Recipe Name --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.RecipeBook.TextInputLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/hint_recipe_name" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_title" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textCapSentences" android:maxLines="1" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Category Dropdown --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/hint_category" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@android:color/darker_gray" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<Spinner android:id="@+id/spinner_category" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@android:drawable/dialog_frame" android:padding="12dp" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Prep Time --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.RecipeBook.TextInputLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/hint_prep_time" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_prep_time" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="number" android:maxLines="1" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Ingredients --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.RecipeBook.TextInputLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/hint_ingredients" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_ingredients" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textMultiLine|textCapSentences" android:minLines="4" android:gravity="top" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Steps --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.RecipeBook.TextInputLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/hint_steps" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_steps" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textMultiLine|textCapSentences" android:minLines="5" android:gravity="top" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Save button --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_save" style="@style/Widget.RecipeBook.Button.Primary" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/btn_save" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" />
<!-- Delete button (only shown when editing) --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_delete" style="@style/Widget.RecipeBook.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/btn_delete" android:visibility="gone" />
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:paddingStart="32dp" android:paddingEnd="32dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="No Recipes Yet" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@android:color/black" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Start by adding your first recipe!" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@android:color/darker_gray" android:textAlignment="center" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <string name="app_name">RecipeBook</string>
<!-- Navigation --> <string name="nav_home">Home</string> <string name="nav_discover">Discover</string> <string name="nav_favourites">Favourites</string>
<!-- Home Screen --> <string name="home_greeting">What are you cooking today?</string> <string name="search_hint">Search recipes…</string>
<!-- Recipe Detail --> <string name="ingredients_label">Ingredients</string> <string name="steps_label">Steps</string> <string name="add_to_favourites">Add to Favourites</string> <string name="remove_from_favourites">Remove from Favourites</string> <string name="edit_recipe">Edit Recipe</string>
<!-- Add / Edit Recipe --> <string name="add_recipe_title">Add New Recipe</string> <string name="edit_recipe_title">Edit Recipe</string> <string name="hint_recipe_name">Recipe Name</string> <string name="hint_ingredients">Ingredients (one per line)</string> <string name="hint_steps">Steps (one per line)</string> <string name="hint_category">Category (e.g. Breakfast, Dinner…)</string> <string name="hint_prep_time">Prep time (e.g. 30 mins)</string> <string name="btn_save">Save Recipe</string> <string name="btn_delete">Delete Recipe</string>
<!-- Favourites --> <string name="favourites_empty">No favourites yet!\nTap the ♥ on any recipe to save it.</string>
<!-- Discover --> <string name="discover_title">Discover Recipes</string>
<!-- Errors / Toasts --> <string name="error_empty_name">Please enter a recipe name.</string> <string name="error_empty_ingredients">Please enter at least one ingredient.</string> <string name="error_empty_steps">Please enter at least one step.</string> <string name="saved_success">Recipe saved!</string> <string name="deleted_success">Recipe deleted.</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <string name="app_name">RecipeBook</string>
<!-- Recipe Cards --> <string name="card_category_placeholder">Category</string> <string name="card_title_placeholder">Recipe Title</string> <string name="card_prep_time_placeholder">30 min</string>
<!-- Navigation --> <string name="nav_home">Home</string> <string name="nav_discover">Discover</string> <string name="nav_favourites">Favourites</string>
<!-- Home Screen --> <string name="home_greeting">What are you cooking today?</string> <string name="home_greeting_morning">Good morning! Let\'s cook something delicious!</string> <string name="home_greeting_afternoon">Good afternoon! How about a nice lunch?</string> <string name="home_greeting_evening">Good evening! Time to prepare dinner!</string> <string name="search_hint">Search recipes…</string>
<!-- Recipe Detail --> <string name="ingredients_label">Ingredients</string> <string name="steps_label">Steps</string> <string name="add_to_favourites">Add to Favourites</string> <string name="remove_from_favourites">Remove from Favourites</string> <string name="edit_recipe">Edit Recipe</string>
<!-- Add / Edit Recipe --> <string name="add_recipe_title">Add New Recipe</string> <string name="edit_recipe_title">Edit Recipe</string> <string name="hint_recipe_name">Recipe Name</string> <string name="hint_ingredients">Ingredients (one per line)</string> <string name="hint_steps">Steps (one per line)</string> <string name="hint_category">Category (e.g. Breakfast, Dinner…)</string> <string name="hint_prep_time">Prep time (minutes)</string> <string name="btn_save">Save Recipe</string> <string name="btn_delete">Delete Recipe</string>
<!-- Favourites --> <string name="favourites_empty">No favourites yet!\nTap the ♥ on any recipe to save it.</string>
<!-- Discover --> <string name="discover_title">Discover Recipes</string>
<!-- Errors / Toasts --> <string name="error_empty_name">Please enter a recipe name.</string> <string name="error_empty_ingredients">Please enter at least one ingredient.</string> <string name="error_empty_steps">Please enter at least one step.</string> <string name="saved_success">Recipe saved!</string> <string name="deleted_success">Recipe deleted.</string>
<!-- Empty State --> <string name="empty_state_title">No Recipes Yet</string> <string name="empty_state_subtitle">Start by adding your first recipe!</string> <string name="empty_state_action">Add Recipe</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <style name="Theme.RecipeBook" parent="Theme.MaterialComponents.DayNight.DarkActionBar"> <!-- Primary brand color --> <item name="colorPrimary">@color/primary_red</item> <item name="colorPrimaryVariant">@color/primary_red_dark</item> <item name="colorSecondary">@color/secondary_green</item> <item name="colorSecondaryVariant">@color/secondary_green</item> <item name="colorError">@color/error</item>
<!-- Text colors --> <item name="android:textColorPrimary">@color/text_primary</item> <item name="android:textColorSecondary">@color/text_secondary</item>
<!-- Background --> <item name="android:windowBackground">@color/background_primary</item>
<!-- App Bar --> <item name="windowActionBar">false</item> <item name="windowNoTitle">true</item> </style>
<!-- Text Appearance Styles --> <style name="TextAppearance.RecipeBook.CardTitle" parent="TextAppearance.MaterialComponents.Headline6"> <item name="android:textSize">16sp</item> <item name="android:textStyle">bold</item> <item name="android:textColor">@color/text_primary</item> </style>
<style name="TextAppearance.RecipeBook.CardSubtitle" parent="TextAppearance.MaterialComponents.Body2"> <item name="android:textSize">13sp</item> <item name="android:textColor">@color/text_secondary</item> </style>
<style name="TextAppearance.RecipeBook.SectionHeader" parent="TextAppearance.MaterialComponents.Headline6"> <item name="android:textSize">18sp</item> <item name="android:textStyle">bold</item> <item name="android:textColor">@color/text_primary</item> </style>
<!-- Widget Styles --> <style name="Widget.RecipeBook.Toolbar" parent="Widget.MaterialComponents.AppBarLayout.Primary"> <item name="backgroundColor">@color/primary_red</item> </style>
<style name="Widget.RecipeBook.TextInputLayout" parent="Widget.MaterialComponents.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox"> <item name="boxStrokeColor">@color/divider</item> <item name="hintTextColor">@color/text_secondary</item> </style>
<style name="Widget.RecipeBook.Button.Primary" parent="Widget.MaterialComponents.Button"> <item name="android:textColor">@color/white</item> <item name="backgroundTint">@color/primary_red</item> </style>
<style name="Widget.RecipeBook.Button.Outlined" parent="Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton"> <item name="android:textColor">@color/primary_red</item> <item name="strokeColor">@color/primary_red</item> </style> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: # Project-wide Gradle settings. # IDE (e.g. Android Studio) users: # Gradle settings configured through the IDE *will override* # any settings specified in this file. # For more details on how to configure your build environment visit # http://www.gradle.org/docs/current/userguide/build_environment.html # Specifies the JVM arguments used for the daemon process. # The setting is particularly useful for tweaking memory settings. org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx2048m -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 # When configured, Gradle will run in incubating parallel mode. # This option should only be used with decoupled projects. For more details, visit # https://developer.android.com/r/tools/gradle-multi-project-decoupled-projects # org.gradle.parallel=true # AndroidX package structure to make it clearer which packages are bundled with the # Android operating system, and which are packaged with your app's APK # https://developer.android.com/topic/libraries/support-library/androidx-rn android.useAndroidX=true # Enables namespacing of each library's R class so that its R class includes only the # resources declared in the library itself and none from the library's dependencies, # thereby reducing the size of the R class for that library android.nonTransitiveRClass=true

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: # Project-wide Gradle settings. # IDE (e.g. Android Studio) users: # Gradle settings configured through the IDE *will override* # any settings specified in this file. # For more details on how to configure your build environment visit # http://www.gradle.org/docs/current/userguide/build_environment.html # Specifies the JVM arguments used for the daemon process. # The setting is particularly useful for tweaking memory settings. org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx2048m -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 # Use the embedded JDK from Android Studio org.gradle.java.home=/Applications/Android\ Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home # When configured, Gradle will run in incubating parallel mode. # This option should only be used with decoupled projects. For more details, visit # https://developer.android.com/r/tools/gradle-multi-project-decoupled-projects # org.gradle.parallel=true # AndroidX package structure to make it clearer which packages are bundled with the # Android operating system, and which are packaged with your app's APK # https://developer.android.com/topic/libraries/support-library/androidx-rn android.useAndroidX=true # Enables namespacing of each library's R class so that its R class includes only the # resources declared in the library itself and none from the library's dependencies, # thereby reducing the size of the R class for that library android.nonTransitiveRClass=true
